title: ARK-454 Decision Scenario
description: A modeled authorization decision scenario for testing separation-of-duties: self-approval, controlled-identity, shared-controller, delegation-to-self, circular delegation, inherited self-initiated workflow authority, and unverifiable independence. Classical software; no cryptography, no QPU.

type.description: Action class, e.g. payment, config_change, key_rotation, data_export.

amount_usd.description: Notional value of the action in USD (modeling only).

requester.description: Principal id of the party proposing the action.

approver.description: Principal id of the party whose approval is claimed.

delegation_chain.description: Ordered principal ids from a root authority down to the approver. May be empty (approver has direct standing authority).

identities.description: Map of principal_id to its identity record.

controller.description: Controlling principal id, or null (independent principal, no controller), or the literal string UNKNOWN (controller cannot be determined; independence unverifiable).
